overall.description: A static cinematic view of a medieval-style dining hall from a video game, featuring high vaulted ceilings, ornate chandeliers, and students in robes sitting at long wooden tables. The scene is warmly lit by artificial lighting with gothic architectural details throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval dining hall with long wooden tables

agents.ego_description: stationary viewpoint observing the dining hall interior from a fixed position

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes sitting at a wooden table, appearing to read or write
student sitting on a bench at the central table, facing away from the camera

entered.detail: Large circular iron chandelier with multiple candle lights hanging from the vaulted wooden ceiling
Tall gothic arched windows with stone frames allowing daylight to filter into the hall
Long rectangular wooden tables arranged in rows throughout the hall
Large dark wooden double doors with metal studs and handles at the far end of the hall
Wall-mounted candle sconces with warm yellow light mounted on the stone walls
Decorative stone arch framing the double doors with intricate carvings
Simple wooden benches paired with the dining tables

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a static view of a grand medieval dining hall with gothic architecture. Warm light from ornate chandeliers and wall sconces illuminates the space, while students in dark robes sit at long wooden tables. The scene features high vaulted ceilings, arched windows on the left wall, and an imposing set of double doors at the far end framed by a stone archway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze across a grand medieval dining hall, capturing the stillness of a scholarly sanctuary. It begins with a wide view of the gothic architecture, where warm light from ornate chandeliers and wall sconces casts a soft glow over the space. The camera lingers on the students in dark robes seated at long wooden tables, emphasizing the scale of the high vaulted ceilings above. The perspective then draws the eye toward the left wall's arched windows before finally settling on the imposing double doors framed by a stone archway at the far end of the hall.
